raw_transcript: Chronic pancreatitis can damage the insulin-producing cells in the pancreas too, leading to 'Type 3c' diabetes. I'm going to check your A1c today. I also want to check your levels of fat-soluble vitamins—A, D, E, and K—since you haven't been absorbing fats well.
final_corrected_note: Chronic pancreatitis can damage the insulin-producing cells in the pancreas too, leading to 'Type 3c' diabetes. I'm going to check your A1c today. I also want to check your levels of fat-soluble vitamins—A, D, E, and K—since you haven't been absorbing fats well.
